title: Vibe Design System – UI Framework by Monday
content: # Monday.com Systems Directories Components Articles Blueprints Guides Glossary Subscribe Vibe from Directories: Components: Vibe Design System from Monday.com is built on best practices for a great user experience and engagement. It includes clear design guidelines, component details, and helpful resources to create high-quality experiences. Design System features detailed Motion guidelines, essential for the product's visual language, and integrated accessibility guidelines in each system component, enhancing user inclusivity. Accessibility Color System Component overview Elevation Figma Repository Motion Spacing Storybook Styles Typography Accordion Alert banner Avatar Badges Breadcrumb Button Checkbox Chip Combobox Data table Date picker Dialog Divider Dropdown Icon Label Link List Menus Modal Progress bar Progress indicator Radio button Search Segmented control Slider Snackbar Switch Tabs Text field Tooltip
